input.headline: Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Cologuard cancer test maker Exact Sciences

raw.headline: Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Cologuard cancer test maker Exact Sciences

winner: Why did the CEO of Exact Sciences laugh so hard at Abbott’s offer? Because he realized his company was about to get *exact* change—just like in a vending machine!

candidates.text: Why did the Texas governor strike a deal with Exact Sciences? Because he wanted to *exact* a premium price from his colon!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'exact' and 'colon' are clever and specific to the headline, with good surprise and brevity."}

candidates.text: I guess Abbott can't stomach the competition anymore—it's swallowed up Exact Sciences whole!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'swallowed up' and 'stomach the competition' are clever and specific to the headline, with a natural flow and surprising twist."}

candidates.text: Why did the CEO of Exact Sciences laugh so hard at Abbott’s offer? Because he realized his company was about to get *exact* change—just like in a vending machine!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay on 'exact change' which ties to the company name, and connects humorously with the vending machine context for surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Abbott said the deal would "exact" a heavy price from its shareholders.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'exact' and the company name with brevity and surprise."}

candidates.text: The governor of Texas bought a colonoscopy kit at Costco yesterday—turns out the store was out of samples, so he settled for the 23-billion-dollar version instead.
